ValidationRule.description: Cannot close win an opp where the closing date is a future date.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves" && CloseDate > TODAY()&& ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Closed Won") && $User.Alias !="sfadmin" && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE') && NOT(ISCHANGED( Quote_Status__c )) && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing" && $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended" && $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Close date cannot be a future date. For further support please contact SalesOps.
